title: DeepSeek: Powerful AI, Zero Cost

modules.title: What DeepSeek Is and Why It Matters That It's Free
modules.sub: Meet the AI model that flips the cost equation
modules.description: You get a fast orientation to DeepSeek — where it came from, how it compares to paid alternatives, and why free doesn't mean limited. By the end, you'll understand why its price tag is actually a big deal for everyday users.

modules.title: What DeepSeek Does Better Than You'd Expect
modules.sub: Discovering the surprising strengths hiding in plain sight
modules.description: You explore the specific tasks where DeepSeek genuinely shines, from nuanced reasoning to long-form drafting, and test your assumptions against what it can actually do. You'll leave with a more accurate mental model of its real capability ceiling.

modules.title: Using DeepSeek for Research, Writing, and Coding
modules.sub: Putting DeepSeek to work on your real everyday tasks
modules.description: You practice hands-on prompting across three core use cases — research synthesis, writing assistance, and code generation — using techniques that get consistently better results. You'll finish with reusable prompt patterns you can apply immediately.

modules.title: Where DeepSeek Falls Short (and What to Use Instead)
modules.sub: Knowing the limits that shape smarter tool choices
modules.description: You map the situations where DeepSeek struggles — from real-time information to certain safety-sensitive tasks — and match those gaps to better-suited alternatives. This module turns honest limitation awareness into a practical decision-making skill.

modules.title: Run It Locally: Privacy, Control, and No API Bills
modules.sub: Taking DeepSeek off the cloud and onto your machine
modules.description: You learn how to run DeepSeek locally using accessible tools, so your data stays on your device and your usage stays free regardless of volume. You'll weigh the tradeoffs of local versus cloud deployment and decide which setup fits your needs.

synopsis: DeepSeek is one of the most capable AI models available right now — and it won't cost you anything to use. This course shows you what it's actually good at, how to get the most out of it, and when to reach for a different tool.
rationale: DeepSeek represents a major shift in accessible AI, but most learners don't know it exists or how it compares to paid options — leaving free, powerful capability completely unused.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can confidently use DeepSeek for everyday tasks like research, writing, and coding, and understand its tradeoffs well enough to choose the right tool for any job.
source_signals: DeepSeek-v3.2: Pushing the frontier of open large language models [pdf]
Open source AI is the path forward
Large language models are having their Stable Diffusion moment
